items.name: Greek Salad
items.description: A combination of fresh peppers, cucumbers, feta cheese, olives and a tangy lemon dressing. **Medium (Serves 8-12), Large (Serves 20-25).**
items.simplified_description: Fresh vegetables with feta cheese, olives, and lemon dressing.

items.name: Bean Salad
items.description: Bean medley, green pepper, red pepper and garlic served with a tangy lemon dressing. **Medium (Serves 8-12), Large (Serves 20-25).**
items.simplified_description: Mixed beans and peppers with garlic and lemon dressing.

items.name: Lentil Salad
items.description: Steamed lentil, bulgur wheat, fried onions served with Tzatziki. **Medium (Serves 8-12), Large (Serves 20-25).**
items.simplified_description: Lentils, bulgur, onions with yogurt-based Tzatziki sauce.

items.name: Saffi Salad
items.description: Bulgur wheat, parsley, chick peas, green onion and lemon dressing. **Medium (Serves 8-12), Large (Serves 20-25).**
items.simplified_description: Bulgur, parsley, chickpeas, and green onions with lemon dressing.

items.name: Chicken Shawarma
items.description: Roasted Chicken cooked on rotisserie, served in pita bread with lettuce, onion, tomato, topped with our special garlic sauce.
items.simplified_description: Rotisserie chicken in pita with veggies and garlic sauce.

items.name: Beef Donair
items.description: Tender beef marinated and spiced, roasted on rotisserie served in a pita with lettuce, onion, tomato, and our sweet sauce.
items.simplified_description: Spiced rotisserie beef in pita with veggies and sweet sauce.

items.name: Mix (Chicken & Beef)
items.description: A mix of chicken & beef served in a pita with lettuce, onion, tomato, and with garlic and sweet sauce.
items.simplified_description: Chicken and beef in pita with veggies, garlic, and sweet sauces.

items.name: Cornerstone (Chicken & Falafel)
items.description: A mixture of chicken and falafel balls. Served in a pita with lettuce, onion, tomato with hummus and tahini sauce.
items.simplified_description: Chicken and falafel in pita with veggies, hummus, and tahini.

items.name: Tabouli & Hummus
items.description: Fresh hummus with Tabouli salad with Mediterranean veggies served in a pita.
items.simplified_description: Hummus and tabouli salad with Mediterranean veggies in pita.

items.name: Falafel Sandwich
items.description: Spiced chickpea patties, served in a pita bread with our blend of authentic Mediterranean veggies and sauces.
items.simplified_description: Spiced chickpea patties in pita with Mediterranean veggies and sauces.

items.name: Chicken Plate
items.description: Roasted chicken served on a bed of rice with Mediterranean veggies and pita.
items.simplified_description: Roasted chicken with rice, Mediterranean veggies, and pita bread.

items.name: Beef Plate
items.description: Tender beef marinated and spiced served on a bed of rice with Mediterranean veggies and pita.
items.simplified_description: Spiced beef with rice, Mediterranean veggies, and pita bread.

items.name: Chicken & Beef Mix Plate
items.description: A mix of chicken & beef served served on a bed of rice with Mediterranean veggies and pita.
items.simplified_description: Chicken and beef with rice, Mediterranean veggies, and pita bread.

items.name: Chicken & Falafel Mix Plate
items.description: Roasted chicken with greek salad, bean salad, tabouli, hommous, tzatziki and garden salad and a falafel ball.
items.simplified_description: Chicken with various salads, hummus, tzatziki, and falafel ball.

items.name: Falafel Plate
items.description: (Vegetarian) five chick pea patties spiced and served with Mediterranean veggies topped with Tahini sauce with a pita bread.
items.simplified_description: Five spiced chickpea patties with veggies, tahini sauce, and pita.

items.name: Mediterranean Plate
items.description: (Flavors of the Mediterranean) 1 Kibi ball, 3 vine leaves, hummus, tabouli, 2 falafel patties served with tahini sauce and pita bread.
items.simplified_description: A Mediterranean mix with kibi ball, vine leaves, hummus, tabouli, falafel, tahini, and pita.

items.name: Mini-Mezza Plate
items.description: Tabouli, hummus, 3 falafel patties served with tahini sauce and pita bread.
items.simplified_description: Small plate with tabouli, hummus, falafel, tahini sauce, and pita bread.

items.name: Assorted Tray
items.description: Spinach fyllo, stuffed vine leaves, falafel balls, hommous, tzatziki & pita wedges. **Medium (Serves 12-15), Large (Serves 20-25).**
items.simplified_description: Tray with spinach fyllo, stuffed vine leaves, falafel, hummus, tzatziki, and pita wedges.

items.name: 3 Dips & Pita Chips
items.description: Tray serves 12-15. Hummus, Tzatziki, Baba Ghanoush, Pita wedges and Pita Chips.
items.simplified_description: Tray with hummus, tzatziki, baba ghanoush, pita wedges, and pita chips.

items.name: Baklava Desert Platter
items.description: Rich, sweet pastry made of layers of filo filled with chopped nuts and sweetened and held together with honey.
items.simplified_description: Sweet filo pastry layered with chopped nuts and honey.

items.description: Rice, green onion, mint, parsley with a touch of lemon. 6 per order.

items.name: Spinach Phyllo
items.description: Spinach and feta cheese, onion baked inside phyllo.
